zh.lifeSummary: 當Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham於1335年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾韓納姆時，她的父親Simon Hanham14歲，母親Agnes Hamaps12歲。她於1357年與Sir John Raleigh在英國薩默塞特維利晨結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年9月28日在威爾士格拉莫爾根可迪享年85歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾艾尤爾梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham于1335年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾韓納姆时，她的父亲Simon Hanham14岁，母亲Agnes Hamaps12岁。她于1357年与Sir John Raleigh在英国薩默塞特維利晨结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年9月28日在威尔士格拉莫爾根可迪享年85岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾艾尤爾梅。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Baroness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Bartnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from Trøndelag, a form of Old Norse burkn ‘fern’ + nes ‘promontary, headland’.
In some cases possibly also an altered form of German   Bartmess  .

variants.name: Bartmess
meanings: American shortened form of German   Barthelmess  .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham was born in 1335, in Hanham, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Simon Hanham, was 14 and her mother, Agnes Hamaps, was 12. She married Sir John Raleigh in 1357, in Williton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 28 September 1420, in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 85, and was buried in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham est née en 1335, à Hanham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Simon Hanham, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hamaps, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Raleigh en 1357, à Williton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 septembre 1420, à Coity, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham 1335 in Hanham, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Hanham 14 und ihre Mutter Agnes Hamaps 12. Sie hat 1357 in Williton, Somerset, England Sir John Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. September 1420 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham è nata il nel 1335 nel Hanham, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Simon Hanham, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Agnes Hamaps, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Raleigh nel 1357, nel Williton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 28 settembre 1420, nel Coity, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanhamが1335年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアハンハムで生まれた時，父Simon Hanhamは14歳，母Agnes Hamapsは12歳であった。1357年にイギリスソメルセトウィリトンでSir John Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年9月28日にウェールズグラモーガンコイトイで85歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエウエルメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham(이)가 1335년 영국 그루스스터실르 핸함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Hanham(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Hamaps(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1357년 영국 서머세트 윌리턴에서 Sir John Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 9월 28일 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham nasceu em 1335, em Hanham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon Hanham, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hamaps, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Raleigh em 1357, em Williton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1420, em Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham родилась в 1335 г. в местности ханам, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Simon Hanham было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hamaps, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Raleigh в 1357 г. в местности уиллитон, сомирсет, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 сентября 1420 г. в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности ювелм, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ismania Lady Baroness Kerdeston deHanham nació en 1335, en Hanham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon Hanham, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Agnes Hamaps, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Sir John Raleigh en 1357, en Williton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1420, en Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
